scripts.start: concurrently -n "AUTH,DONOR,HOSP,REQS,GTWY" -c "magenta,blue,green,yellow,cyan" "npm run start:auth" "npm run start:donor" "npm run start:hospital" "npm run start:request" "npm run start:gateway"
scripts.start:prod: concurrently -n "AUTH,DONOR,HOSP,REQS,GTWY" -c "magenta,blue,green,yellow,cyan" "npm run start:auth:prod" "npm run start:donor:prod" "npm run start:hospital:prod" "npm run start:request:prod" "npm run start:gateway:prod"
